ddls:
CREATE TABLE "recruitment_boards" (
  "board_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recruitment board */,
  "board_name" TEXT /* Name of the recruitment board */,
  "board_description" TEXT /* Description of the recruitment board */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the recruitment board */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the recruitment board */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the recruitment board */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the recruitment board */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the board record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the board record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("board_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_postings" (
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job posting */,
  "board_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the recruitment board posting the job */,
  "post_title" TEXT /* Title of the job position */,
  "qualification" TEXT /* Qualification requirements for the job */,
  "last_date" TEXT /* Last date for submitting applications */,
  "details_link" TEXT /* Link to detailed job notification */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the job position */,
  "salary_range" TEXT /* Salary range for the job position */,
  "number_of_vacancies" INTEGER /* Number of vacancies available for the job position */,
  "experience_required" TEXT /* Experience required for the job position */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the job posting was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the job posting was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_postings_board_id FOREIGN KEY ("board_id") REFERENCES recruitment_boards ("board_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job application */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job posting to which the application is submitted */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate submitting the application */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date the application was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the application (e.g., pending, shortlisted, rejected) */,
  "application_method" TEXT /* Method of application (e.g., online, offline) */,
  "cover_letter_file" TEXT /* File path to the candidate's cover letter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the application was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the application was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES job_postings ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the candidate */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the candidate */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the candidate */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the candidate */,
  "resume_file" TEXT /* File path to the candidate's resume */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the candidate */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the candidate */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the candidate record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the candidate record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interviews" (
  "interview_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interview */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job application for which the interview is scheduled */,
  "interview_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the interview */,
  "interviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interviewer */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the interview */,
  "interview_type" TEXT /* Type of interview (e.g., in-person, video call) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes from the interview */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the interview record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the interview record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interview_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interviews_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interviews_interviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("interviewer_id") REFERENCES interviewers ("interviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interviewers" (
  "interviewer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interviewer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the interviewer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the interviewer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the interviewer */,
  "board_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recruitment board the interviewer belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the interviewer within the recruitment board */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the interviewer record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the interviewer record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interviewer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interviewers_board_id FOREIGN KEY ("board_id") REFERENCES recruitment_boards ("board_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_offers" (
  "offer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job offer */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job application to which the offer is extended */,
  "offer_date" TEXT /* Date the job offer was extended */,
  "offer_letter_file" TEXT /* File path to the offer letter */,
  "offer_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the job offer is expected to start */,
  "salary_offered" TEXT /* Salary offered in the job offer */,
  "benefits" TEXT /* Benefits included in the job offer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the job offer record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the job offer record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("offer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_offers_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id")
)
